features: SPA EXPERIENCE GIFT: Luxurious and relaxing bath and shower gel for men and women. Moisturising, hydrating, and revitalising spa experience at home that leaves skin feeling soft and refreshed.

SINCE 1981: We have spent 40 years perfecting the infusion of mineral salts into skincare products and treatments to deliver outstanding results and relief from skin concerns, including repairing and hydrating skin cells not just at the surface level but beyond.

HYDRATES ALL SKIN TYPES: The rich, foaming bath shower gel is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive and very dry skin. With an allergen-free spa fragrance, this set is suitable for itchy and psoriasis/ eczema prone skin.

POWERFUL INGREDIENTS: Infused with hydrating Dead Sea Salt that exfoliates dead skin cells and reduces irritation, organic seaweed rich in essential vitamins, minerals, and amino acids, and plant extracts that replenish and nourish for soft, healthy skin.

VEGAN & CRUELTY FREE: Free from dairy, gluten, GMOs, parabens, sulphates, silicones, and other nasties. Clean and ocean-friendly formulas that are safe for aquatic life if dispersed into waterways, and the recyclable bottles are made with bio-based sugarcane plastic.
description: Product Description Spa treatment ✓ A moisturising bath and shower gel blended with mineral-rich Dead Sea Salt, Organic Seaweed, and Organic Plant Extracts ✓ Allergen-free spa fragrance How to use ✓ In the bath, swirl under running water to create a Spa bubble bath. ✓ In the shower, massage into wet skin and rinse. Kind to you ✓ Creates a rich foam, which will rejuvenate and pamper the skin ✓ Suitable for all skin types, including dry or sensitive skin.
